title: Robert Frank
compiled_truth: Robert Frank is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-01), Robert Frank sent 48 and received 905 emails, totalling 953 interactions. Top correspondents: [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (18), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (17), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (16), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (12), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (11).
